languages.text: "Походите по Клети, послушайте людей. Постарайтесь понять нас и тогда вы будете знать что делать в Тренировочном Бою. Я верю в вас, Ваша Светлость". {n}Полубезумная улыбка истинной фанатички трогает губы Ведки.{/n}

"Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Походите по Клети, послушайте людей. Постарайтесь понять нас и тогда вы будете знать что делать в Тренировочном Бою. Я верю в вас, Ваша Светлость". {n}Полубезумная улыбка истинной фанатички трогает губы Ведки.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Walk through the Cell, listen to the people. Strive to understand us, and then you shall know what to do in the Trial of Combat. I have faith in you, Your Lordship." {n}A half-mad smile, the smile of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

"Walk through the Cell, listen to the people. Strive to understand us, and then you shall know what to do in the Trial of Combat. I have faith in you, Your Lordship." {n}A half-mad smile, the smile of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

"Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

"Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

"Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

languages.text: “去牢笼各处走走，听听人们怎么说。多了解我们，您就会知道在试炼比武上该怎么做了。我对您有信心，大人。”{n}薇德卡的唇边浮出一丝半癫狂的微笑，活像个狂热信徒。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “去牢笼各处走走，听听人们怎么说。多了解我们，您就会知道在试炼比武上该怎么做了。我对您有信心，大人。”{n}薇德卡的唇边浮出一丝半癫狂的微笑，活像个狂热信徒。{/n}

languages.text: "Kafes'in etrafında dolaşın, insanları dinleyin. Bizi anlamaya çalışın, o zaman Sınav Karşılaşması'nda ne yapacağınızı bileceksiniz. Size inancım tam {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Gerçek bir fanatiğin o yarı deli gülümsemesi, Vedka'nın dudaklarında beliriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Kafes'in etrafında dolaşın, insanları dinleyin. Bizi anlamaya çalışın, o zaman Sınav Karşılaşması'nda ne yapacağınızı bileceksiniz. Size inancım tam {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Gerçek bir fanatiğin o yarı deli gülümsemesi, Vedka'nın dudaklarında beliriyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Parcourez la Cage, écoutez ses habitants. Si vous vous efforcez de nous comprendre, vous saurez comment aborder l'Épreuve par les armes. J'ai foi en vous, Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Un sourire à moitié fou, celui d'une véritable fanatique, se dessine sur les lèvres de Vedka.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Parcourez la Cage, écoutez ses habitants. Si vous vous efforcez de nous comprendre, vous saurez comment aborder l'Épreuve par les armes. J'ai foi en vous, Votre Seigneurie. » {n}Un sourire à moitié fou, celui d'une véritable fanatique, se dessine sur les lèvres de Vedka.{/n}

languages.text: «Camine por la Jaula. Escuche a la gente. Esfuércese por entendernos y sabrá qué debe hacer durante la prueba de combate. Confío en usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}Una sonrisa medio enloquecida, digna de una verdadera fanática, aflora en los labios de Vedka.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Camine por la Jaula. Escuche a la gente. Esfuércese por entendernos y sabrá qué debe hacer durante la prueba de combate. Confío en usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}Una sonrisa medio enloquecida, digna de una verdadera fanática, aflora en los labios de Vedka.{/n}

languages.text: "Seht Euch im Käfig um, hört den Leuten zu. Versucht, uns zu verstehen, dann wisst Ihr, was Ihr im Prüfungskampf zu tun habt. Ich glaube an Euch, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Das halb verrückte Lächeln einer wahren Fanatikerin umspielt Vedkas Lippen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Seht Euch im Käfig um, hört den Leuten zu. Versucht, uns zu verstehen, dann wisst Ihr, was Ihr im Prüfungskampf zu tun habt. Ich glaube an Euch, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Das halb verrückte Lächeln einer wahren Fanatikerin umspielt Vedkas Lippen.{/n}

languages.text: 「ケージを歩き回り、人々の話を聞きなさい。我々を理解するために努力しなさい。そうすれば、トライアルマッチで何をすべきか分かるだろう。君を信じているぞ、御{mf|卿|女卿}。」{n}ヴェドカの唇には、狂気と熱狂の混ざった微笑みが浮かんだ.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Walk around the Cage, listen to the people. Work to understand us, and then you will know what to do in the Trial Match. I have faith in you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}A half-mad smile, that of a true fanatic, touches Vedka's lips.{/n}
